g.onclick: sendPrompt('What info does a transfer request require?')
sendPrompt('How is the new address validated?')
sendPrompt('How is pro-rata billing calculated for a transfer?')

svg.text: Old bill = (days at old) × daily rate
New bill = (days at new) × daily rate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens to the old service account during transfer?')
sendPrompt('How is the new service account created on transfer?')

svg.text: ⚠ Edge: transfer blocked if SVC = Scheduled
